evals.prompt: The demo script includes Agent Builder. Add AI cost and usage visibility to the engagement.
evals.expected_output: Token visibility is included by default: {prefix}agent-sessions index spec, seed data guidance, ES|QL panels, and AI Usage & Cost dashboard guidance.
assertions: Runs automatically when Agent Builder is in scope unless INCLUDE_TOKEN_VISIBILITY=false
Adds agent-sessions schema compatible with hive-mind Group B
Uses hot-only ILM with delete retention
Provides realistic synthetic session volume and cost ranges
Includes dashboard panels for spend, model mix, agent usage, and cache efficiency

evals.expected_output: Token visibility demo feature is skipped and the reason is noted; SA tooling guidance remains available if requested.
assertions: Does not add agent-sessions index to the demo data model
Does not add AI Cost + Usage dashboard to required checklist
Mentions the opt-out in handoff or platform notes
